notes:
Dành means to set aside or reserve something for someone or something. It’s about intentionally keeping time, money, space, or effort for a purpose.

It’s most natural with things like thời gian, tiền, công sức, tình cảm, chỗ.  

It often shows care or priority — you choose to keep something instead of using it right away.  
Close in feeling to để dành (save up), which focuses more on keeping for later.
exampleSentences: Em đã dành một ít thời gian để giúp anh học tiếng Việt.
Chị muốn dành chiếc bánh này cho em vào ngày sinh nhật.
Anh luôn cố gắng dành tiền mỗi tháng để đi du lịch.

translation.en: I will dedicate time for you.

content.sentence: Tôi sẽ ___ thời gian cho bạn.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I have set aside some time to help you learn Vietnamese.
She wants to set aside this cake for you on your birthday.
He always tries to set aside money every month to travel.

example.en: I set aside time for my family.
example.vi: Tôi dành thời gian cho gia đình.

definitions.en: to set aside or allocate something for a specific purpose
definitions.es: reservar o asignar algo para un propósito específico
definitions.vi: dành ra hoặc phân bổ cái gì đó cho một mục đích cụ thể

translation.en: We need to allocate for the meeting.

content.sentence: Chúng ta cần ___ cho cuộc họp.

notes_md:
**Dành** means to set aside or reserve something for someone or something. It’s about intentionally keeping time, money, space, or effort for a purpose.

It’s most natural with things like **thời gian, tiền, công sức, tình cảm, chỗ**.  

It often shows care or priority — you choose to keep something instead of using it right away.  
Close in feeling to **để dành** (save up), which focuses more on keeping for later.
